ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "referred_by" TEXT /* Customer ID of the referrer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Phone, Internet) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Residential, Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the service (e.g., Basic, Premium) */,
  "data_limit" REAL /* Data limit of the service (in GB) */,
  "speed_limit" REAL /* Speed limit of the service (in Mbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who subscribed to the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ended (if applicable) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription will be renewed (if applicable) */,
  "auto_renewal" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription will be automatically renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Withdrawal, Credit Card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer being billed */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the billing entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the referral */,
  "referred_customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who was referred */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date the referral was made */,
  "referral_reward" REAL /* Reward given to the referrer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referred_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referred_customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who used the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the service was used */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of usage (e.g., minutes, GB) */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., local, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ended */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign (e.g., new customers, existing customers) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., promotional, informational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who responded to the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign responded to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the customer responded */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., email open, click-through) */,
  "response_action" TEXT /* Action taken as a result of the response (e.g., conversion, lead generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who interacted with customer service */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the interaction (e.g., issue resolved, unresolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer service agent who handled the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_interactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES customer_service_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who received the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., technical support, billing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service associated with the plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_plans_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion ended */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_promotions" (
  "customer_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer promotion */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who received the promotion */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the customer received the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)
